label: Transparent Stag Beetle motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated stag beetle with prominent mandibles, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: a single stag beetle viewed slightly from above, complete body visible, large curved mandibles, glossy mahogany-brown elytra, black-brown head and legs, subtle oak-tan highlights on shell ridges, accurate insect anatomy, hard polished chitin texture, crisp silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; do not crop antennae, legs, mandibles, or shell.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves glossy mahogany shell detail and black oak-tan contrast without cast shadows.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the beetle fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no second insect, no leaves, no branches, no soil, no oak forest scene, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no text, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Stag Beetle" / "Stag Beetle Mandibles", derived from the visible isolated stag beetle motif. This is a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible source board for a strong admin system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 4K-class design source, target 3840x2160. Use a precise grid and large readable section labels.
Reference use: extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the stag beetle motif: glossy mahogany shell, black chitin, oak tan edge lines, horn/mandible arcs, hard shell ridges, subtle forest-bark texture.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Stag Beetle", motif story, palette swatches with names, English typography, Japanese typography with sample "\u65e5\u672c\u8a9e UI", components, navigation/sidebar, dashboard/data charts, forms, tables, command/search, status badges and alerts, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
UI content: admin dashboard system with compact sidebar, top command search, KPI tiles, data table, filters, form controls, tabs, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, segmented controls, badges, alerts, loading/empty/error states.
Visual language: strong operational product UI, crisp shadcn-style components, 8px radius or less, dark brown hairline borders, mandible-arc dividers, shell-ridge texture, black-oak structural sidebars, mahogany primary actions, oak-tan secondary surfaces, amber focus rings, off-white paper background.
Color palette: Mahogany Shell #7b2f1f, Chitin Black #14100d, Oak Tan #c5a36d, Bark Umber #4a281b, Carapace Wine #5b1715, Parchment #f4ead7, Smoke Taupe #9c8974, Resin Amber #b86d28, Forest Shadow #251811. Use only these motif-derived colors and close neutrals.
Typography: compact admin hierarchy, strong headings, tabular numerals, Japanese UI guidance using Noto Sans JP style; keep labels short and readable.
Constraints: no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no unrelated saturated colors, no huge rounded cards, no decorative landing page hero, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelled theme title, no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Stag Beetle" / "Stag Beetle Mandibles", translated from the visible light board and isolated stag beetle motif. It must feel like the same strong admin system in dark mode, not a different theme.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 4K-class design source, target 3840x2160. Use a precise grid and large readable section labels.
Reference use: preserve the light board structure, component language, shell-ridge texture, mandible-arc dividers, compact dashboard/table/forms layout, typography guidance, and palette roles. Derive the dark surfaces from black chitin, forest shadow, bark umber, and deep carapace wine; keep mahogany shell primary actions, oak tan text/support, resin amber focus and warnings, parchment highlights.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Stag Beetle", label "Dark Mode", motif story, palette swatches with names, English typography, Japanese typography with sample "\u65e5\u672c\u8a9e UI", components, navigation/sidebar, dashboard/data charts, forms, tables, command/search, status badges and alerts, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
UI content: dark admin dashboard system with compact sidebar, top command search, KPI tiles, data table, filters, form controls, tabs, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, segmented controls, badges, alerts, loading/empty/error states.
Visual language: strong operational product UI, crisp shadcn-style components, 8px radius or less, matte black-oak panels, deep shell-brown cards, subtle bark texture, thin oak-tan borders, mandible-arc separators, glossy mahogany active states, amber rings, parchment text, restrained contrast.
Color palette: Forest Shadow #251811, Chitin Black #14100d, Bark Umber #4a281b, Carapace Wine #5b1715, Mahogany Shell #7b2f1f, Oak Tan #c5a36d, Smoke Taupe #9c8974, Resin Amber #b86d28, Parchment #f4ead7. Use only these motif-derived colors and close neutrals.
Typography: compact admin hierarchy, strong headings, tabular numerals, Japanese UI guidance using Noto Sans JP style; keep labels short and readable.
Constraints: no neon, no pure flat black void, no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no huge rounded cards, no decorative landing page hero, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelled theme title, no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
